props.heading: Welcome to Your Website
props.subheading: Built with drag and drop. Click any element to edit, or drag new components from the sidebar.

props.content: This is your starter template. Click on any element to edit its content, or drag new components from the sidebar on the left. When you're happy with your design, hit Publish to push it live.

cards.title: Drag & Drop
cards.description: Rearrange sections by dragging them into the position you want.

cards.title: Live Preview
cards.description: Preview your site before publishing to make sure it looks perfect.

cards.title: One-Click Publish
cards.description: Push your site live to Vercel with a single click.
